blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No true AWQ model available. Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors (GPTQ format). E2E validation blocked - running AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf (AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction, GPTQ weights have non-zero zeros).

VAL-AWQ-001.summary: AWQ dual kernel produces numerically correct output

VAL-AWQ-002.summary: AWQ dual kernel loads and engine correctly selects it when AWQ mode enabled

VAL-AWQ-003.summary: AWQ dual kernel shows 2.3-4.1% speedup over GPTQ dual kernel

VAL-AWQ-004.summary: C dispatch integration verified, E2E blocked by lack of true AWQ model

recommendations.description: Obtain true AWQ model (with qweight/scales but no qzeros) to validate VAL-AWQ-004 E2E
recommendations.rationale: Current 'AWQ' model directory has qzeros tensors, making it GPTQ format. AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights produces NaN/Inf. AWQ format is characterized by absence of zero-point tensors.

Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ.note: Model labeled 'AWQ' is actually GPTQ format (has qzeros tensors)
